comment: Curated CC0/free asset sources whose downloads require a browser (no stable hotlink API). search_assets returns these as download:'manual' — the user downloads the zip from the homepage, then import_asset_zip pulls it into the project. URLs are checked by CI.

entries.name: Kenney Pixel Platformer
entries.note: Pixel-art platformer tiles + simple animated character sheets.

entries.name: Kenney Platformer Characters
entries.note: Character spritesheets with walk/jump frames — slice with create_sprite_frames.

entries.name: Kenney UI Pack
entries.note: Buttons, panels, sliders for menus and HUDs.

entries.name: Quaternius Ultimate Animated Character Pack
entries.note: Low-poly 3D characters with baked idle/walk/run/attack animations (glTF). After import, use add_model_to_scene.

entries.name: Quaternius Universal Animation Library
entries.note: Large shared animation library for humanoid rigs.

entries.name: Mixamo (Adobe) — auto-rig + animation library
entries.license: Free with Adobe account (check Adobe terms)
entries.note: Upload any humanoid model, auto-rig it and apply thousands of animations; export FBX/glTF, then import_asset_zip or drop the file into the project.
